daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events on the Horizon

top_events.title: Starship Flight 12
top_events.description: 12th test flight of the two-stage Starship launch vehicle. Maiden Flight of Starship V3.
top_events.action: Watch live for groundbreaking technology demonstration.

top_events.title: Vega-C Launch with SMILE Mission
top_events.description: Vega-C launches the Solar wind Magnetosphere Ionosphere Link Explorer (SMILE) to study Earth's magnetosphere.
top_events.action: Tune in for live coverage and mission insights.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 level geomagnetic storm expected, visible to 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check the skies if you're in a high-latitude area.

alerts.title: Starship Flight 12
alerts.message: 12th test flight of the two-stage Starship launch vehicle. Maiden Flight of Starship V3.
alerts.action_required: Watch live for groundbreaking technology demonstration.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
